articles.title: @CloudflareDev — Gemma 4 Just Landed on Cloudflare Workers AI — 256K Context, Tool Calling, Vision
articles.summary: @CloudflareDev announces Gemma 4 is now on Workers AI — MoE model with 26B total and 4B active parameters, 256K context window, tool calling, reasoning, and vision capabilities.

articles.title: SemiAnalysis Lawsuit — Former Employee Says Dylan Patel Fired Him for Refusing to Insert Confidential Data
articles.summary: Former SemiAnalysis employee sues Dylan Patel for wrongful termination after refusing to insert confidential Fluidstack investment data into paid research reports.

articles.title: @techsnif — AI Hiring Surge: Major Labs Expanding Teams Across Engineering, Research, and Policy
articles.summary: AI labs are hiring aggressively across engineering, research, and policy roles as the industry accelerates. Q1 2026 saw record AI hiring alongside record VC funding.

articles.title: Anthropic Banned OpenClaw — And the Creator Says They Copied Features First
articles.summary: Anthropic banned OpenClaw from Claude subscriptions. The creator says they copied features first. Hermes is the winner.

articles.title: Hermes Agent Outperforms Claude Code and OpenClaw on 89 Real-World Tasks — Not Just Higher Scores
articles.summary: Hermes Agent outperforms Claude Code and OpenClaw on 89 real-world tasks — a higher floor, not just higher scores. The winner of the OpenClaw ban.

articles.title: Q1 2026 VC Funding Hits $297B — AI Startups Capture 81%, Four Companies Raised 64% of the Total
articles.summary: Q1 2026 VC funding hit a record $297B with AI capturing 81% — but just four companies raised 64% of all capital, showing extreme concentration.

articles.title: @haydenfield — Mustafa Suleyman: Renegotiating Microsoft-OpenAI Deal 'Unlocked Ability to Pursue Superintelligence'
articles.summary: @haydenfield reports Mustafa Suleyman says renegotiating Microsoft's contract with OpenAI 'unlocked Microsoft's ability to pursue superintelligence' — and he's stepping back from product to focus on frontier models.

articles.title: Google Researchers Reveal Every Way Hackers Can Trap, Hijack AI Agents
articles.summary: A Google DeepMind paper maps six attack categories against autonomous AI agents—from invisible HTML commands to multi-agent flash crashes.

articles.title: Kimi K2.5 (1 Trillion Parameters) Now Runs at 7.5 tok/s on Mac M5 Max 128GB via SSD Streaming
articles.summary: anemll-flash-llama.cpp enables Kimi K2.5 (1T params) at 7.5 tok/s on M5 Max 128GB via SSD streaming — a breakthrough for local inference.

articles.title: Liquid AI LFM2 Is Not a Transformer — And It's 3x Faster Than Qwen at the Same Scale
articles.summary: Liquid AI's LFM2 is not a Transformer — it's 3x faster than comparable Transformer models at the same parameter scale.

articles.title: GEN-1 From Generalist AI — 99% Success Rate, 3x Faster — The ChatGPT Moment of Robotics
articles.summary: GEN-1 from Generalist AI achieves 99% success rates on physical tasks — multiple researchers call it the ChatGPT moment of robotics.

articles.title: Bonsai 8B Runs at 40+ tok/s on iPhone 17 Pro — The First Dense 8B Model at This Speed on a Phone
